---
title: "ML From Scratch"
---
<br>

## [Optimization]{.glow-blue}

#### [Goal: Given a function, how can we find its minimum value]{.glow-green}

1. **Understanding Gradients**
    a. [**Understanding slope/ gradient of lines**](/src/optimization/01_gradient_desc__line_slope.qmd)
    b. [**Understanding gradient of curves**](/src/optimization/02_gradient_desc__curve_gradient.qmd)
2. Understanding Gradient Descent
